name: Carl
text: Haley does amazing meal prep! Everything is fresh, healthy, and high in protein, which fits perfectly with my fitness lifestyle. The portions are well balanced and save me a lot of time during the week. Highly recommended—she’s a fantastic private chef!

name: Allison
text: Haley was such an amazing chef!! I hired her for a bachelorette dinner with 11 girls. She made the whole experience so easy - giving lots of menu options and being so accommodating across the board. The Night of everything was timed perfectly, the food was so amazing, and kitchen was spotless by the time she left. Would recommend anyone hire her for their next group dinner

name: Leslie
text: What an amazing experience to have Haley create her magic!  The food was fabulous and the presentation beyond belief. I was so impressed and satisfied. Thank you Haley for making our evening perfect.

name: Lis
text: Lovely dining experience prepared by a lovely cheerful woman! Haley prepared a three-course seafood dinner in our kitchen. Everything was delicious and made from locally sourced ingredients. She's great for a small private dinner or large party.

name: Cindy
text: Haley’s food presentation and taste were wonderful… it was not only a taste treat but a visual one as well.. I would highly recommend her to cater your next party!

name: Madeline
text: Just went to a cocktail party. The food was elevated, inventive, beautiful and most importantly delicious. Haley Wexler is an extremely talented chef. I highly recommend her to others.

name: Ronn
text: Just polished off a fantastic three-course meal prepared for my family by Haley. The first course was tuna bon-bons, the second consisted of a crab cake on a garden salad, and the third was a linguini clam/mussel/shrimp medley. All three were fantastic! I highly recommend Haley and would definitely hire her again!

name: Anneka
text: Haley has catered (and decorated, and bar tended, and cleaned!) several parties for us and I truly can’t say enough good things about her. Her food is delicious and fresh and she works closely with you to design a menu that works for your group. Haley is extremely professional and super easy to work with. I look forward to working with her again!

name: Caitlin
text: Can't recommend Haley Wexler Private Chef enough. We had Haley prepare a three-course meal for 12 people celebrating a private wedding we hosted at our apartment. Haley listened to our requests, prepared a beautiful menu, and went above and beyond to accommodate two guests with severe gluten allergies. Everyone was over the moon excited about the end result, and Haley was a pleasure to work with - responsive, professional, reliable, and flexible. We'll definitely be using her again!

name: Ana
text: Haley and her team are absolutely fantastic chefs and I couldn’t recommend them enough. My husband and I have been working with Haley for a few months now and she meal preps the most delicious and healthy meals for us weekly. Everything is sparkling clean when she leaves. It’s made our lives so much easier and we love to eat at home more.

name: Alex
text: Haley and her team of chefs are great to work with! Her meals are always such a great treat and saves our family so much time. Love that her meals are customizable and our kitchen is left neat and tidy. Also a much healthier alternative to takeout. Thanks Haley!

name: BettyAnn
text: Delicious meal expertly presented with super fresh ingredients. Each course was cooked perfectly and all ingredients complimented one another. Truly a special meal!

name: Frank
text: Haley has been meal prepping for me for over a year, and she consistently delivers delicious, healthy meals that I’m actually excited to eat. Her menu planning is creative and she’s great at working with dietary preferences. She’s responsive when I need changes and she always leaves my kitchen spotless. If you're looking for reliable, high-quality meal prep with great variety, I can’t recommend Haley and her team enough. I’m eating so much healthier thanks to her.

name: Laura
text: Haley and her team have been game changing for our family of four! I’m so happy to get home at night to delicious and healthy meals in my fridge and our kids have really enjoyed expanding their horizons as well. She is incredibly professional and an excellent chef. Highly recommend!

name: Anna
text: Highly recommend to anyone looking for meal prep help! I’ve been working with Chef Haley consistently for over a year and she’s been amazing at keeping healthy & ready-to-eat food in our fridge, working with me to introduce new foods into our toddler’s palate, and creatively incorporate veggies into our family’s favorite dishes. She and her team are all very friendly & efficient, the food is excellent, the service is convenient- it is a great experience all around.

name: Valerie
text: Wonderful evening spent with friends.....The evening was made extra special due to Haley's culinary skills....superb presentation and mouth watering delectable cuisine....Many different flavors....no one went home hungry...Thank you Haley...

name: Lindsay
text: Hayley was amazing to work with. She was easy to coordinate with and very friendly! She showed up on time and cleaned everything up. Her food was delicious, would definitely use her for another event and highly recommend her!

name: Thomas
text: From planning to plating, Haley exceeded expectations. Thank you for making this Mother’s Day one to remember

name: Jack
text: Haley and her team do an incredible job. Consistently delicious and healthy food. Couldn’t recommend more!

name: Elizabeth
text: Absolutely delicious. We could not stop raving about how wonderful the food was and how wonderful the entire evening was. Thank you!

name: Robbie
text: Awesome intimate dinner for my birthday and Haley did an amazing job creating a custom Italian Japanese fusion menu and preparing an unbelievable meal. Thanks again for such a great night

name: Naomi
text: Haley made an amazing sushi feast for a Galentine’s Day party and it was absolutely amazing!!!

name: Sumayya
text: Professional, flexible, provides great service that is really high-end!
